      Calvin Bailey MBE MP
      Serving Leyton and Wanstead 

      It's an honour to have been elected as your Member of Parliament and to serve the people and communities of Leyton & Wanstead.

      ​

      My team and I are here to support you - so if there's a local issue you wish to speak to us about, please get in touch.​

      GET IN TOUCH

      Stay up-to-date

      Sign up to my constituent newsletter.

      Calvin's Work in Parliament & the Constituency

      Campaigns & Local Priorities

      Whipps Cross Hospital

      Whipps Cross Hospital urgently needs an upgrade. Redevelopment will create a state-of-the-art facility, support NHS staff, provide new homes, generate jobs, and improve care for our community.

      Anti-social Behaviour & Crime

      Persistent antisocial behaviour and criminality profoundly impact our community. We must tackle these issues, support residents facing intimidation, and work together to create safer streets for all.

      Public Transport Accessibility 

      A lack of step-free access and changes to local bus services (the W12, W13, and W14 routes) affect families’ and vulnerable residents' access to key services like Whipps Cross Hospital and public transport in the area.

      National Issues

      Empowering Young People

      Education lays the groundwork for future success, and access to the arts, sports, and volunteering is crucial. I want everyone in our area to have access to these opportunities.

      ​

      Supporting Veterans

      We have around 4,000 veterans in our community in need of support to flourish in civilian life. Improving access to healthcare, housing, and employment is essential.

      ​

      Housing

      London’s housing crisis—driven by a shortage of affordable homes and insecure renting—hurts families and council budgets. Supporting leaseholders and strengthening renters’ rights are essential for safe, affordable housing.

      Latest News

      Response to the attack on Jewish Londoners in Golders Green

      My message to our Jewish community in Leyton and Wanstead following the horrific attack on Jewish Londoners in Golders Green.
      2 days ago

      Marking the Month of the Military Child

      I was proud to host a reception in Parliament marking the Month of the Military Child, bringing together the Royal British Legion, Never Such Innocence, parliamentarians, and young people from Armed Forces families.
      National Issues
      3 days ago

      My London Marathon 2026 run for Samaritans

      A big thank you to everyone who supported my London Marathon run last weekend! Finished in 03:26 and even got my medal from Dawn Butler MP. I ran for the Samaritans, to show support for our wonderful Waltham Forest branch.
      4 days ago

      FIND OUT NOW

      About Calvin

      Calvin is the Labour Member of Parliament for Leyton and Wanstead, elected on the 5th of July 2024. Born in Zambia and raised in London, his commitment to social justice was shaped by personal experiences, including the tragic murder of his family friend, Stephen Lawrence.

       

      Prior to his political career, Bailey served for 24 years in the Royal Air Force, achieving the rank of Wing Commander and earning an MBE for his work.

      READ MORE

      How can we help?

      My team and I regularly hold Advice Surgeries to help people across Leyton & Wanstead.
